title: Applications
description: Review tenant creation requests from self-service signup users

approve.title: Approve Application
approve.description: Approve the tenant application for "{name}"? The user will be able to sign in and use the platform.

reject.title: Reject Application
reject.description: Reject the tenant application for "{name}"? The user will not be able to sign in to this tenant.

ban.title: Ban Applicant
ban.description: Ban "{name}"? Their account will be globally banned and they cannot sign in to any tenant.

empty.title: No Applications
empty.description: Tenant creation applications from self-service signup users will appear here
